name: Meltwater
description:
Meltwater is the all-in-one solution for PR and social media management. You can analyze media and social media coverage with ease, with both qualitative and quantitative metrics to understand brand conversations comprehensively. 

  • A widget library lets you customize your dashboard
  • Data is interactive and exportable to give the context behind the numbers. You can even analyze performance across platforms to evaluate where your strategy needs work, and where you’re nailing it
  • Never miss a thing. Meltwater tracks over 300,000 online news sources, has partnerships for print and broadcast monitoring, and listens to social conversations 
  • Get insights from Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, comments, review sites, forums, message boards, and over 300 million blogs

Key features:

✅ Interactive and exportable data

✅ Social listening

✅ Retrieve historical data
what_people_say:
What people say :

Meltwater is an incredible, specialized social listening tool. You can research and monitor social conversations with unlimited queries, engage and publish from one platform, easily find social influencers, dig into consumer insights, and discover communities driving social conversations. Here’s what customers say: 

"Meltwater’s coverage is unmatched, but it's not without its issues. The customer service could be better, and we occasionally have problems with tagging."

“Meltwater has undergone a huge change from how I first used them in 2017. Back then, their databases were stale and out-of-date and their account representatives seemed only interested in getting you to renew your contract. Those days are gone! Now their database is dynamic and well researched. The monitoring tools are effective and easy to use. Their account representatives are available to help you troubleshoot and optimize your use of their tools. And, they now have well-built training videos, frequent webinars, and a wonderful community. Meltwater has changed the game and is offering a superior product with a lot of different touchpoints that allow you to be the best Comms professional your organization has ever seen!”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Robust customer support
  • 🚫 Multi-brand management
  • 🚫 Ads support
